BSTD
A lightweight C library providing common data structures and utilities for systems programming.

7#ifndef BSTD_STRVIEW_H
8#define BSTD_STRVIEW_H
9
10#include <bstd/error.h>
11#include <stdbool.h>
12#include <stddef.h>
13
14typedef struct
15{
16 const char *data;
17 size_t length;
18} bstd_strview;
19
20typedef struct
21{
22 bool ok;
23 union
24 {
25 bstd_strview value;
26 bstd_error error;
27 };
28} bstd_strview_result;
29
30typedef struct
31{
32 bstd_strview source;
33 size_t current_index;
34 bstd_strview qry;
35} bstd_strview_split_iter;
36
37typedef struct
38{
39 bstd_strview left;
40 bstd_strview right;
41} bstd_strview_split_once_result;
42
43#define BSTD_STRVIEW_EMPTY \
44 (bstd_strview) \
45 { \
46 .data = NULL, .length = 0 \
47 }
